category_sources: Official GitHub repository description and README usage describe Overmind as a Procfile/tmux process manager.
source_facts.description says it is a process manager for Procfile-based applications and tmux.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is named DarthSim/overmind and README uses Overmind.
docs_sources: Official README includes installation, build, and usage sections, including help commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/DarthSim/overmind; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README build instructions use Go and usage section documents the command-line process manager.
source_facts.description identifies Procfile-based applications and tmux.
